title: syntherisma formosana subsp. hirsuta
intro: Syntherisma formosana subsp. hirsuta, also known as the hairy Taiwanese syntherisma, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to Taiwan. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its leaves and roots containing compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Syntherisma formosana subsp. hirsuta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which have been traditionally used in folk medicine for various ailments.
